nasb.text: The sons of Israel also killed Balaam the son of Beor, the diviner, with the sword among the rest of their slain.

esv.text: Balaam also, the son of Beor, the one who practiced divination, was killed with the sword by the people of Israel among the rest of their slain.

cnv.text: 在以色列人所殺的人中，比珥的兒子占卜者巴蘭也被他們用刀所殺。

ccb.text: 以色列人所杀的人中有比珥的儿子术士巴兰。
